name: Civil Involvement Project (CIP101)
summary: Mentored primary school students from socio-economically disadvantaged areas near Sabancı University.
highlights: Led activities promoting children’s rights, communication skills, creativity, and self-confidence.
Facilitated workshops and interactive sessions to enhance students' personal development.

name: Organizer at CAKUF (Cakabey National Forum)
summary: Contributed to event planning and coordination as part of the organizing team.
highlights: Gained experience in logistics, communication, and team collaboration.
